taskTemplate.name: Initial Document Quality Assurance
taskTemplate.description: Review initial disclosure documents for compliance and completeness

subTaskTemplate.name: 1003 – Declarations Complete
subTaskTemplate.description: 1003 – Returned for all borrowers
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – 1003 – Declarations Complete

subTaskTemplate.name: 1003 – Demographic Info Addendum
subTaskTemplate.description: 1003 – Demographic Info Addendum – Demographic Information Addendum collected
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – 1003 – Demographic Info Addendum

subTaskTemplate.name: 1003 – Demographic Info Addendum Signed
subTaskTemplate.description: 1003 – Demographic Info Addendum Signed – Demographic Information Addendum not collected; not marked on 1003
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – 1003 – Demographic Info Addendum Signed

subTaskTemplate.name: Sub-Task Name
subTaskTemplate.description: 1003 – Demographic HELOC - Demographic information is collected only when the proceeds are used to pay off an existing lien-secured debt, qualifying the transaction as a refinancing for regulatory reporting purposes.
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – 1003 – Demographic HELOC

subTaskTemplate.name: ROV Sent with Initial Disclosures
subTaskTemplate.description: ROV Sent with Initial Disclosures – Right to Request Reconsideration of Value sent with initial disclosures
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – ROV Sent with Initial Disclosures

subTaskTemplate.name: eConsent – Completed Prior to Electronic Send
subTaskTemplate.description: eConsent – Completed Prior to Electronic Send – eConsent completed before electronically sending disclosures
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – eConsent – Completed Prior to Electronic Send

subTaskTemplate.name: eConsent – Docs Mailed if No eConsent
subTaskTemplate.description: eConsent – Docs Mailed if No eConsent – If no eConsent, documents mailed prior to disclosure due date
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – eConsent – Docs Mailed if No eConsent

subTaskTemplate.name: Supplemental Consumer Information Form
subTaskTemplate.description: Supplemental Consumer Information Form – One Supplemental Consumer Information Form per URLA
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – Supplemental Consumer Information Form

subTaskTemplate.name: HELOC Important Terms Disclosure
subTaskTemplate.description: HELOC Important Terms Disclosure – HELOC Important Terms Disclosure provided
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – HELOC Important Terms Disclosure

subTaskTemplate.name: Your Home Loan Toolkit
subTaskTemplate.description: Your Home Loan Toolkit – Provided within 3 business days of application
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – Your Home Loan Toolkit

subTaskTemplate.name: 2015 Settlement Service List
subTaskTemplate.description: 2015 Settlement Service List – Provided
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – 2015 Settlement Service List

subTaskTemplate.name: Acknowledgement of Intent to Proceed
subTaskTemplate.description: Acknowledgement of Intent to Proceed – Acknowledgement of Intent to Proceed obtained; date entered matches date on form
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – Acknowledgement of Intent to Proceed

subTaskTemplate.name: CHARM Booklet
subTaskTemplate.description: CHARM Booklet – CHARM Booklet provided within 3 business days
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – CHARM Booklet

subTaskTemplate.name: ARM Disclosure
subTaskTemplate.description: ARM Disclosure – ARM Disclosure sent same day as application; matches product and index as of day sent
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – ARM Disclosure

subTaskTemplate.name: Credit Score Disclosure Completed
subTaskTemplate.description: Credit Score Disclosure Completed – Information is complete and matches credit report with all scores present
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – Credit Score Disclosure Completed

subTaskTemplate.name: Homeowner Counseling List and Acknowledgement
subTaskTemplate.description: Homeowner Counseling List and Acknowledgement – 10 counselors provided based on borrower's address
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – Homeowner Counseling List and Acknowledgement

subTaskTemplate.name: Notice of Right to Copy of Appraisal (ECOA)
subTaskTemplate.description: Notice of Right to Copy of Appraisal (ECOA) – Notice of Right to Copy of Appraisal (ECOA) provided
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – Notice of Right to Copy of Appraisal (ECOA)

subTaskTemplate.name: Privacy Notice Received
subTaskTemplate.description: Privacy Notice Received – Privacy Notice provided and saved in folder
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – Privacy Notice Received

subTaskTemplate.name: Privacy Policy – Opt Out Signed
subTaskTemplate.description: Privacy Policy – Opt Out Signed – Opt Out signed (if applicable)
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – Privacy Policy – Opt Out Signed

subTaskTemplate.name: RI Appraisal Fee Notice
subTaskTemplate.description: RI Appraisal Fee Notice – RI Appraisal Fee Notice provided
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – RI Appraisal Fee Notice

subTaskTemplate.name: RI Right to Copy of Appraisal
subTaskTemplate.description: RI Right to Copy of Appraisal – RI Right to Copy of Appraisal provided
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – RI Right to Copy of Appraisal

subTaskTemplate.name: RI Notice of Non-Refundability
subTaskTemplate.description: RI Notice of Non-Refundability – RI Notice of Non-Refundability provided
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – RI Notice of Non-Refundability

subTaskTemplate.name: RI Form 1
subTaskTemplate.description: RI Form 1 – RI Form 1 completed and signed by Loan Originator
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – RI Form 1

subTaskTemplate.name: RI Form 2
subTaskTemplate.description: RI Form 2 – RI Form 2 completed and signed by Loan Originator
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – RI Form 2

subTaskTemplate.name: RI Open-End Credit Disclosures
subTaskTemplate.description: RI Open-End Credit Disclosures – RI Open-End Credit Disclosures (Gen Laws 6-27-11, O/OC Only)
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – RI Open-End Credit Disclosures

subTaskTemplate.name: RI Choice of Insurance
subTaskTemplate.description: RI Choice of Insurance – RI Choice of Insurance provided
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – RI Choice of Insurance

subTaskTemplate.name: RI Title Insurance Disclosure
subTaskTemplate.description: RI Title Insurance Disclosure – RI Title Insurance Disclosure executed with all boxes checked
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – RI Title Insurance Disclosure

subTaskTemplate.name: USA Patriot Act Info Disclosure
subTaskTemplate.description: USA Patriot Act Info Disclosure – USA Patriot Act Info Disclosure provided
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – USA Patriot Act Info Disclosure

subTaskTemplate.name: HELOC Booklet
subTaskTemplate.description: HELOC Booklet – HELOC Booklet provided within 3 business days
subTaskTemplate.type: Initial Document Quality Assurance – HELOC Booklet
